title: The World or Myself?
overview: The city of afforestation, Kazamatsuri. In this city which promotes the coexistence of culture and greenery, Tennouji Kotarou is tormented by supernatural phenomena night after night...

title: Where Youth Begins
overview: Kotarou meets the academy witch, Senri Akane, and joins the occult research club. He starts taking part in occult club activities and gathering club members in order to prove that supernatural phenomena exist.

title: Welcome, Paranormal Phenomena
overview: The occult research club finally begins regular activities. For their first investigation, they search for a tsuchinoko.

title: Until We Return to Those Days
overview: Kotarou searches for the elderly gentleman he met to ask him about unidentified mysterious animals.

title: Asahi Haruka
overview: One day, a letter regarding "Asahi Haruka" arrives at the Occult Research Club, and Kotarou immediately begins an investigation.

title: Occult Club Activity Log
overview: With Chihaya and Lucia's disagreement resolved, the occult club resumes activities.

title: A Place Lost
overview: Five days after losing contact with Inoue, Akane suddenly announces that occult club activities have been suspended.

title: My Name Is Kagari-chan
overview: Kotarou is unable to get in touch with Akane, Chihaya, Lucia, Shizuru, or Kotori after the incident in the forest. It is then that a girl appears before him.

title: Fate Begins to Turn
overview: Kotarou brings Kagari to the city to help her "find herself" after she gets amnesia.

title: Simply, As Friends
overview: Kotarou reunites with Kotori, and learns her and Kagari's secret. Meanwhile, someone breaks through the barrier and infiltrates Kotori's secret base.

title: Countdown
overview: Chihaya heads to Sakuya's location on Akane's orders. While she is wandering through the forest looking for Kotori's secret base, she discovers a certain person who has collapsed.

title: The Song of Destruction
overview: Kagari begins to act strangely. Elsewhere, Midou shows up with his Earth Dragon and destroys the barrier around where Kotarou's group is staying.

title: The Promise I Made with You
overview: As the song of destruction echoes across the skies, monsters appear and nature runs amok, destroying the world. Meanwhile, the gang rejoices at Kagari's returning to her senses, but that's when Esaka shows up...

title: Three Cups of Coffee
overview: Kotarou wakes up in a deserted town, and the only thing he knows is that he must talk to the girl on the hill.

title: Honeymoon Over a Silent Ocean
overview: As Kagari's research continues to take its toll on her, Kotarou looks to help her out and realizes the true significance of her theory of life.

title: The Truth Nobody Knows
overview: Kotarou gets the occult club back together one last time to help Kagari finish her theory. Will she make it in time?

title: Earth-Saving Hunter
overview: The story returns to when Kotarou was a superhuman without a cause, the Earth-Saving Hunter.

title: Superhuman Qualities
overview: Life changes drastically for Kotarou as Esaka invites him to join Guardian.

title: The Forest of Tragedy
overview: Kotarou returns to Kazamatsuri, where Guardian begins a fateful operation that ends in tragedy.

title: Moving On From a Standstill
overview: Unable to stay in Japan anymore, Kotarou flees to a war zone, where he comes to a standstill yet again. Will he be able to move on?

title: Reunion
overview: Back in Japan, Kotarou finds himself in Kazamatsuri once again, where he meets quite a few familiar faces.

title: Battle Behind the Scenes
overview: As Kotarou infiltrates deeper into Gaia and learns more about the group, he is forced to make a choice that Kagari may not necessarily approve of.

title: Follower of the Lodestar
overview: In order to save Kagari, Kotarou faces off with Gaia and Guardian.

title: A Promise Fulfilled with You
overview: In order to rewrite Kagari’s fate, Kotarou heads toward the final battle.
